incident: Connection slot exhaustion (FATAL: too many clients) combined with deadlock cascade on orders table, causing lock wait timeouts across 40+ backends; ultimately triggered server shutdown

ground_truth.needle: fatal:  sorry, too many clients already
ground_truth.desc: all 100/100 connection slots consumed, new connections rejected

ground_truth.needle: number of connection slots currently in use: 100/100
ground_truth.desc: connection pool hit the max_connections limit
circular lock dependency between backends on orders/inventory tables

ground_truth.needle: canceling statement due to lock timeout
ground_truth.desc: backends killed after waiting too long for locks
lock wait exceeded 1000 ms, deadlock imminent
postmaster shut down under connection pressure
